title: euphrasia litoralis
intro: Euphrasia litoralis, also known as sea blue eye or marsh eyebright, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Euphrasia, commonly found in wetlands and coastal areas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe and calm irritated eyes, skin, and respiratory tract. The health benefits of Euphrasia litoralis include relief from conjunctivitis, sinusitis, and other eye and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and antihistamine. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia litoralis can be made into teas, tinctures, and eye drops, allowing for a range of applications and uses.
